question: What are your office hours?
answer: Our office is open from 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM, Monday through Friday. We are closed on weekends and public holidays.

question: Where is your office located?
answer: Our main office is located at 123 Innovation Drive, Tech Park, San Francisco, CA 94105. You can find us on the 5th floor.
variations: How do I find your office?

question: How can I contact you?
answer: You can reach us via email at support@company.com, call us at +1 (800) 555-0199, or use the live chat on our website. Our support team is available during business hours.

question: What does your company do?
answer: We are a technology company specializing in cloud-based software solutions for businesses. Our products include project management tools, CRM systems, and data analytics platforms.

question: How long has your company been in business?
answer: We were founded in 2015 and have been serving clients worldwide for over 10 years. We've grown from a small startup to a team of 200+ professionals.

question: Do you have a mobile app?
answer: Yes! Our mobile app is available for both iOS and Android. You can download it from the Apple App Store or Google Play Store by searching for our company name.
variations: Can I use this on my phone?
Where can I download the app?

question: What products do you offer?
answer: We offer three main products: 1) CloudSync Pro — a project management platform, 2) CustomerHub — a CRM solution, and 3) DataInsight — a business analytics tool. Each comes with various tier options.

question: Do you offer a free trial?
answer: Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial for all our products. No credit card required. You can sign up on our website and start exploring all features immediately.
variations: How do I get a trial?

question: What is CloudSync Pro?
answer: CloudSync Pro is our flagship project management platform. It offers task tracking, team collaboration, Gantt charts, time tracking, and integrations with 50+ popular tools like Slack, GitHub, and Google Workspace.

question: Do you offer custom solutions?
answer: Absolutely! We offer custom enterprise solutions tailored to your business needs. Contact our sales team at sales@company.com to discuss your requirements and get a personalized quote.
variations: Can I get a tailored solution?

question: What integrations do you support?
answer: We support 50+ integrations including Slack, Microsoft Teams, Google Workspace, GitHub, Jira, Salesforce, Zapier, and many more. You can also use our REST API to build custom integrations.
variations: What apps do you integrate with?

question: Do you provide API access?
answer: Yes, all our paid plans include full REST API access. You can find our comprehensive API documentation at docs.company.com/api. We also provide SDKs for Python, JavaScript, and Java.
variations: How do I access the API?

question: What are your pricing plans?
answer: We offer three plans: Starter ($9/month per user), Professional ($29/month per user), and Enterprise (custom pricing). All plans include core features, with advanced features in higher tiers. Annual billing saves you 20%.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express), PayPal, bank transfers, and wire transfers. Enterprise clients can also pay via purchase orders.
variations: Can I pay with credit card?

question: Can I get a refund?
answer: Yes, we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all plans. If you're not satisfied, contact our billing team at billing@company.com and we'll process your refund within 5-7 business days.
variations: How do I get my money back?

question: Do you offer discounts for students or nonprofits?
answer: Yes! We offer 50% off for students and educational institutions, and 30% off for registered nonprofits. Contact us at discounts@company.com with valid proof of status to apply.

question: Can I change my plan?
answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time from your account settings. Upgrades take effect immediately, and downgrades apply at the start of your next billing cycle.

question: Do you offer annual billing?
answer: Yes, we offer both monthly and annual billing options. Annual billing saves you 20% compared to monthly payments. You can switch to annual billing from your account settings.

question: How do I cancel my subscription?
answer: You can cancel your subscription anytime from Account Settings > Billing > Cancel Plan. Your access will continue until the end of your current billing period. No cancellation fees apply.

question: How do I create an account?
answer: Visit our website and click 'Sign Up'. You can register with your email address or sign up using your Google, Microsoft, or GitHub account. Verification email will be sent to confirm your account.

question: How do I reset my password?
answer: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page, enter your email address, and we'll send you a password reset link. The link expires in 24 hours. If you don't receive it, check your spam folder.

question: Is my data secure?
answer: Absolutely. We use AES-256 encryption for data at rest, TLS 1.3 for data in transit, and follow SOC 2 Type II compliance standards. We also offer two-factor authentication and regular security audits.

question: Do you offer two-factor authentication?
answer: Yes, we support two-factor authentication (2FA) via authenticator apps (Google Authenticator, Authy) and SMS verification. You can enable 2FA from Account Settings > Security.

question: Can I delete my account?
answer: Yes, you can delete your account from Account Settings > Privacy > Delete Account. Please note that account deletion is permanent and all your data will be removed within 30 days per our data retention policy.
variations: I want to delete my data

question: How do I update my profile information?
answer: Go to Account Settings > Profile to update your name, email, profile picture, and other personal information. Changes are saved automatically.

question: What is your privacy policy?
answer: We take privacy seriously. We never sell your data to third parties. Our full privacy policy is available at company.com/privacy. We comply with GDPR, CCPA, and other applicable data protection regulations.
variations: How do you handle my information?

question: How long does shipping take?
answer: Standard shipping takes 5-7 business days, express shipping takes 2-3 business days, and overnight shipping is available for most locations. Delivery times may vary for international orders.

question: Do you ship internationally?
answer: Yes, we ship to over 50 countries worldwide. International shipping typically takes 7-14 business days. Customs duties and taxes may apply depending on your country.

question: How do I track my order?
answer: Once your order ships, you'll receive a tracking number via email. You can track your package at company.com/track or through the carrier's website (FedEx, UPS, or DHL).

question: What is the shipping cost?
answer: Standard shipping is free for orders over $50. For orders under $50, standard shipping costs $5.99, express shipping costs $12.99, and overnight shipping costs $24.99.

question: Can I change my delivery address?
answer: You can update your delivery address before your order ships. Go to Orders > Select Order > Edit Address. If the order has already shipped, please contact our support team for assistance.
variations: Change where my order is going?

question: How do I contact customer support?
answer: You can reach our support team via: 1) Live chat on our website (fastest), 2) Email at support@company.com, 3) Phone at +1 (800) 555-0199, or 4) Submit a ticket at support.company.com.

question: What are your support hours?
answer: Our support team is available Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM EST. Premium and Enterprise plan users have access to 24/7 priority support.

question: What is your average response time?
answer: Our average response time is under 2 hours for email and tickets, and under 5 minutes for live chat. Enterprise clients receive priority support with a guaranteed 30-minute response time.
variations: How long to get a reply?

question: Do you have a knowledge base or help center?
answer: Yes! Visit help.company.com for our comprehensive knowledge base with 500+ articles, video tutorials, and step-by-step guides covering all our products and features.

question: Can I request a feature?
answer: Absolutely! We love hearing from our users. Submit feature requests at feedback.company.com. Our product team reviews all suggestions monthly, and popular requests are prioritized for development.

question: The app is not loading. What should I do?
answer: Try these steps: 1) Clear your browser cache and cookies, 2) Try a different browser, 3) Disable browser extensions, 4) Check your internet connection, 5) If the issue persists, contact support with your browser version and any error messages.

question: How do I clear my cache?
answer: In Chrome: Settings > Privacy > Clear Browsing Data. In Firefox: Settings > Privacy > Clear Data. In Safari: Preferences > Privacy > Manage Website Data. Select 'Cached images and files' and click Clear.

question: What browsers do you support?
answer: We support the latest versions of Google Chrome, Mozilla Firefox, Safari, and Microsoft Edge. For the best experience, we recommend using Google Chrome. Internet Explorer is not supported.

question: Why am I getting an error message?
answer: Error messages can occur for various reasons. Please note the exact error code or message and contact our support team. Common errors include: 401 (authentication issue), 403 (permission denied), 404 (page not found), and 500 (server error).

question: How do I export my data?
answer: Go to Account Settings > Data > Export Data. You can export your data in CSV, JSON, or PDF format. The export will be prepared and sent to your email within a few minutes.

question: What are the system requirements?
answer: Our web app works on any modern browser with an internet connection. For optimal performance, we recommend: 4GB+ RAM, a stable internet connection (5 Mbps+), and a screen resolution of at least 1280x720.
variations: What do I need to run it?

question: Are you hiring?
answer: Yes, we're always looking for talented people! Check out our open positions at company.com/careers. We offer competitive salaries, remote work options, and great benefits.

question: Do you offer internships?
answer: Yes, we offer paid internship programs in engineering, design, marketing, and business development. Internships are typically 3-6 months. Apply at company.com/careers/internships.

question: Do you allow remote work?
answer: Yes, we are a remote-first company! Most positions are fully remote, with optional access to our offices in San Francisco and New York. We support flexible working hours across time zones.

question: What is your return policy?
answer: We offer a 30-day return policy for physical products. Items must be in original condition with packaging. Digital products are covered by our 30-day money-back guarantee. Contact support to initiate a return.

question: What are your terms of service?
answer: Our full Terms of Service are available at company.com/terms. Key points include: you must be 18+ to use our services, you're responsible for your account security, and we reserve the right to modify services with notice.

question: Do you have an SLA?
answer: Yes, we offer Service Level Agreements for Professional and Enterprise plans. Our standard SLA guarantees 99.9% uptime. Enterprise clients can negotiate custom SLAs. Details at company.com/sla.

question: How do you handle data breaches?
answer: In the unlikely event of a data breach, we follow a strict incident response plan: 1) Contain the breach, 2) Assess the impact, 3) Notify affected users within 72 hours, 4) Report to relevant authorities, and 5) Implement corrective measures.
variations: What if my data is leaked?

question: Do you have a community forum?
answer: Yes! Join our community at community.company.com. Connect with other users, share tips, ask questions, and participate in discussions. We also have active communities on Discord and Reddit.

question: Do you host events or webinars?
answer: Yes, we host monthly webinars on product features, quarterly user meetups, and an annual conference called 'TechConnect'. Register for upcoming events at company.com/events.

question: How can I become a partner?
answer: We offer partnership programs for resellers, agencies, and technology partners. Visit company.com/partners to learn about partnership tiers, benefits, and how to apply.
